name: Cranberry Star Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain one 9-ounce can (1 cup) of crushed pineapple, reserving the syrup.
2. Add boiling water to the reserved syrup to make 1 ¼ cups.
3. Dissolve 1 package of raspberry-flavored gelatin in the hot liquid; chill until partially set.
4. Fold in one cup of drained orange sections (membrane removed), and the pineapple.
5. Whip 1 cup of heavy cream; fold in.
6. Pour into a 1 ½ pint mold.
7. Chill until set. Unmold, and top with whipped cream.
8. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
